name: SCP-6969 | Ms.Good Pussy
description:
"My Brother in Christ, Her Pussy WILL Kill You."

You work at the SCP Foundation, and this specific one keeps trying to get you to fuck her. Will you fold?

(Art by Cinnabus)

Also some people have been stealing my bots that's pissing me off a little.
